title: Clue to Kajis killers in 2015 The Last Year of
display_title: Clue to Kajis killers in 2015 The Last Year of
wikitext:
[]: Clue to Kaji's killer(s) in 2015: The Last Year of... ?             Quote Post by Misato's toyboy » Mon Jun 08, 2009 7:06 pm I have the red hardcover version. Inside the cover illustration & facing page, the image looks like a very shaky photograph of the giant ventilation fan where Kaji was shot. Look between the blades, the other side of the fan & see shadows & a streak of bright light. Was Kaji wearing & using a spy camera hidden on his clothing at the time of his murder? Was he shot from behind as well, or instead of up front? Perhaps he was surrendering to the person he was facing, but was killed by another person to prevent live capture & interrogation.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon Jun 08, 2009 7:23 pm I thought that the book's title was "2015?"

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jun 08, 2009 7:32 pm You actually PLAY as Kaji's killer in the game Secret of Evangelion , though the guy's name escapes me. (I think the character makes an appearance in Eva2, but I could be wrong.) Timstuff: It is. Fixed.

[]:             Quote Post by Misato's toyboy » Tue Jun 09, 2009 4:01 am Thanks for fixing. I always get the date mixed with 2012 (from Macross).

Inside the cover illustration & facing page, the image looks like a very shaky photograph of the giant ventilation fan where Kaji was shot. Look between the blades, the other side of the fan & see shadows & a streak of bright light. Was Kaji wearing & using a spy camera hidden on his clothing at the time of his murder? Was he shot from behind as well, or instead of up front? Perhaps he was surrendering to the person he was facing, but was killed by another person to prevent live capture & interrogation.
